speaker: barista
text: Good morning! Welcome to Brew House. What can I get for you today?

speaker: customer
text: Hi! I'd like a latte, please. With oat milk.

speaker: barista
text: Sure, one oat milk latte. Would you like any flavor syrup with that?

speaker: customer
text: Yes, a shot of vanilla, please. And can I get a blueberry muffin too?

speaker: barista
text: Of course! That will be seven fifty. How would you like to pay?

speaker: customer
text: Card, please. Can I also get a glass of water?

speaker: barista
text: No problem. Your total is seven fifty, tap your card here.
